test_completeness.justification: Frontend layout/CSS change. Every AC has a unit and/or real-browser E2E proof; AC-6 (badge overlay) is unit-covered (E2E would need seeded inbox/triage data). 0 testable-but-untested.

behaviors.behavior: AC-1 phone: ProjectFilterDropdown portaled into MainLayout top bar via MobileTopBarSlot (useState publish); not rendered in board header
behaviors.evidence: unit MobileTopBarSlot.test.tsx (portal renders into published slot; null outside provider) PASSED; E2E 90-phone 'dropdown moves into the top bar' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC-2 phone: status filter = funnel-icon Radix multi-select menu (StatusFilterMenu); pill row hidden; preventDefault keeps menu open; active dot
behaviors.evidence: unit BoardStatusFilter.test.tsx (open/toggle/stay-open/dot/no-pills) PASSED; E2E 90-phone AC-1/AC-2 PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC-3 phone: header row fits without awkward wrap (no pill row, dropdown moved out)
behaviors.evidence: E2E 90-phone 'no horizontal page overflow at /' @393px PASSED + AC-1/AC-2 menu E2E PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC-4 compact: List launch CTA icon-only (TerminalLaunchButton compact label hidden lg:inline)
behaviors.evidence: unit TaskList.test.tsx 'launch control hides text label below lg' PASSED; E2E 80-tablet 'Title widest column' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC-5 compact: Projects Path column hidden lg:table-cell -> no bottom horizontal scrollbar
behaviors.evidence: unit ProjectsPage.test.tsx 'Path header+cells carry hidden lg:table-cell' PASSED; E2E 80-tablet 'projects table drops Path -> no in-card scroll' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC-6 rail: Inbox/Triage count badge overlays the icon when collapsed (not clipped); inline when expanded
behaviors.evidence: unit SidebarNavItem.test.tsx (overlay when collapsed single-instance; inline when expanded) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: AC-7 tablet: board lanes flexible (basis-0 grow min-200) fit all three with no right cut-off; <768 carousel; >=1024 fixed 360
behaviors.evidence: E2E 80-tablet 'board fits all three lanes' + 'all three visible WITHOUT scrolling' @820px PASSED; desktop justify-between @1280/1024 non-regression PASSED

enumeration_basis.basis: one behavior row per acceptance criterion (AC-1..AC-7); jsdom-unverifiable real-layout outcomes (AC-7 lane widths, AC-5 scrollbar) proven by Playwright at 820px/393px

surface_verification.runner: BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3947 playwright test e2e/flows/80-tablet-responsive.spec.ts e2e/flows/90-phone-responsive.spec.ts (+49-project-filter,90-all-projects-cascade) — isolated stack: built client served by Hono, temp USERPROFILE, loopback, no Claude spawn
surface_verification.justification: Tablet (chromium @820px) + phone (mobile-chromium/Pixel5 @393px) projects; 35 responsive + 2 desktop-non-regression specs all green.

degraded.detail: No OPENAI/GEMINI API keys in env; fell back to the internal shipwright-plan:opus-plan-reviewer (degraded-mode). It surfaced 2 HIGH + 4 MED/LOW issues, all addressed before build.
